review:
Apex Legends is the only game where:

- you loot for 20 minutes  
- become emotionally attached to a purple shield  
- and then get deleted in 0.3 seconds by a bald Wraith with 40,000 kills and no social life.

My random teammates move like NPCs from a mobile game:
one lands alone,
one disconnects,
and the third guy is fighting an entire squad with a Mozambique and pure confidence.

The movement is amazing.
The gunplay is incredible.
My mental health has been sent to another dimension.

“Last game before sleep” is the biggest lie ever told.

10/10.
Installed it again 14 minutes after uninstalling.

review:
初期のＥＡのみで配信されていた時期に1000時間以上やっていた。
フォトナと同じく、カジュアルFPSを広めた功績は大きい。

一方、APEX最大の功罪はPADのエイムアシストだろう。
初期から問題視されていたが、エイムアシストに弱体化が入っても近距離だととんでもない火力が出る。
プロがキーマウからPADに転向した事例がかなり多い事が事態の深刻さを物語っている(逆は皆無)。

FPSを始めたきっかけになったPAD勢も多いので、その意味では名作だが、せめてキーマウとＰＡＤの鯖を分けるべきだったと今でも思う。

review:
Sim, depois de quase 2000h ainda não recomendo, especialmente se você não quer se estressar.
Apex já foi muito bom, mas atualmente a situação está desinteressante. 

Se você é brasileiro ou está na América do Sul, esqueça jogar no servidor daqui, só tem cheaters, cronus zen e jogadores que não veem luz solar há dias; além de ter que esperar mais de 10 min pra achar UMA PARTIDA. Então sim, se quiser ter o mínimo de diversão possível, vai ter que jogar lagado, em server dos EUA com 150 de ping (em dias bons).

Não há matchmaking nas partidas, por mais que tentem dizer que sim. São ínfimos os ajustes no battle royale e zero, literalmente zero em partidas de "MIXTAPE" (dominação, corrida de armas e mata mata). O problema se agrava nesse modo MIXTAPE, pois como não há pareamento equilibrado, você acaba jogando com players muito acima de você, com habilidades muito melhores.

O sistema de denuncias do Apex é falho e praticamente inútil. Existem milhares de jogadores com contas secundarias (smurfs), usando cronus zen ou hacks, e não há nenhum feedback ou retorno sobre suas denuncias, não acontece nada, NADA, com os players.
-Presenciei um player level ~500 com simplesmente 5300 kills (sendo que a maioria dos players CASUAIS tem por volta de 7000 kills no level 1100-1300). 
É algo que sinceramente não gera prazer nenhum em jogar.

Apex Legends é da EA e isso já é um problema por si só.
Assim como sua imagem, o Apex possui monetização agressiva, são skins com mira e formato melhores, pacotes caros, moeda cara, customização de skins bloqueada se não possuir a que é paga...
-E houve recentemente a ideia e realização (algo que voltaram atras por causa das criticas) de ter que recomprar o passe cada temporada por 110 reais.
Não há problema nisso se o jogo já houvesse apresentado esse sistema desde o dia 1, mas foi uma mudança abrupta depois de varias temporadas (21 temporadas) somente no pensamento de lucrar.

As áreas dos mapas mudam toda temporada (mudar no sentido de rework) e isso gera uma desconexão e necessidade de se acostumar gigantesca. Existem mapas que não funcionam nas partidas ranqueadas e outros que são desnecessariamente grandes para partidas rápidas.

Não se pode escolher o mapa que vai jogar, é o que está disponível e ainda rotaciona entre 3, ou seja, jogue com o que estiver lá, e isso relaciona o dito acima dos mapas certos pra cada tipo de jogo.

No quesito de novas lendas (personagens jogáveis), é a mesma ideia do Valorant: Lançar o boneco quebrado e muito forte e só arrumar em datas especificas ou no final da temporada.

Além do pensamento de que se uma lenda é muito pickada (usada) ela está forte e precisa ser nerfada, o problema é que nem sempre isso é verdade.
-Muitas vezes não é que uma lenda muito jogada esteja forte mas sim que as outras estão fracas; no entanto, isso nem se passa pela cabeça da Respawn (estúdio que desenvolve o Apex Legends).
Isso faz com que muitas lendas boas caiam no esquecimento porque tomaram um nerf injusto ou sejam esquecidas por serem fracas demais.

São muitos pontos que tiram sua diversão nesse jogo, ou te irritam bastante.

review_english: Yes, after almost 2000h I still don't recommend it, especially if you don't want to stress. Apex was once very good, but currently the situation is uninteresting. If you are Brazilian or in South America, forget about playing on the server here, there are only cheaters, cronus zen and players who haven't seen sunlight for days and have to wait more than 10 minutes to find A MATCH. So yes, if you want to have as little fun as possible, you'll have to play laggardly, on a US server with 150 ping (on good days). There is no matchmaking in the matches, no matter how much they try to say there is. There are minimal adjustments in battle royale and zero, literally zero in "MIXTAPE" matches (domination, arms race and deathmatch). The problem gets worse in this MIXTAPE mode, because as there is no balanced pairing, you end up playing with players far above you, with much better skills. Apex's reporting system is flawed and practically useless. There are thousands of players with secondary accounts (smurfs), using Cronus Zen or hacks, and there is no feedback or feedback on their reports, nothing happens, NOTHING, with the players. -I witnessed a level 500 player with simply 5300 kills (most CASUAL players have around 7000 kills at level 1100-1300). It's something that honestly doesn't generate any pleasure in playing. Apex Legends is from EA and that is a problem in itself. Just like its image, Apex has aggressive monetization, there are skins with better aim and format, expensive packages, expensive currency, skin customization blocked if you don't have the one that is paid for... -And there was recently the idea and realization (something that was delayed due to criticism) of having to repurchase the pass each season for 110 reais. There would be no problem with that if the game had already presented this system since day 1, but it was an abrupt change after several seasons (21 seasons) just with the thought of making a profit. The map areas change every season (change in the sense of rework) and this creates a huge disconnect and need to get used to it. There are maps that don't work in ranked matches and others that are unnecessarily large for quick matches. You can't choose the map you're going to play, it's what's available and still rotates between 3, that is, play with whatever is there, and this relates what was said above to the right maps for each type of game. In terms of new legends (playable characters), it's the same idea as Valorant: Launching the broken and very strong doll and only fixing it on specific dates or at the end of the season. In addition to the thought that if a legend is picked (used) a lot, it is strong and needs to be nerfed, the problem is that this is not always true. -Often it's not that a heavily played legend is strong but that the others are weak, however, this doesn't even occur to Respawn (the studio that develops Apex Legends). This causes many good legends to fall into oblivion because they were unfairly nerfed or forgotten because they are too weak. There are many points that take away your fun in this game, or irritate you a lot.

review: Лично мне в Apex больше всего импонирует то, что играть банально удобно. Интерфейс, скины оружия и персонажей радуют глаз, системные требования очень демократичны, а картинка, несмотря на лежащего в основе Titanfall Engine старичка Source, выглядит весьма симпатично. Управление лаконичное и понятное даже новичкам: к примеру, автоматическая установка модификаций оружия и снаряжения позволяет сохранять высокую динамику матчей. Система меток и сообщений — отдельный разговор: такого простого и приятного в использовании средства коммуникации со случайными союзниками я ещё не встречал.

Управление лаконичное и понятное даже новичкам к примеру, автоматическая установка модификаций оружия и снаряжения позволяет сохранять высокую динамику матчей. Система меток и сообщений отдельный разговор такого простого и приятного в использовании средства коммуникации со случайными союзниками я ещё не встречал.
review_english: Personally, what appeals to me most about Apex is that it’s simply convenient to play. The interface, weapon and character skins are pleasing to the eye, the system requirements are very affordable, and the picture, despite the old Source underlying the Titanfall Engine, looks very nice. The controls are concise and understandable even for beginners, for example, automatic installation of weapon and equipment modifications allows you to maintain high dynamics in matches. A system of tags and messages, a separate conversation, I have never seen such a simple and pleasant means of communication with random allies.

review:
チートが問題視されているが、チートとPADの見分けが付かない事が問題
公式がチートを生み出しているといっても過言じゃない
オルターやらアクセルとかいうレジェンド、何を食ったらそんなレジェンドを思いつくの？
転回、戦術、ウルトを駆使して敵を倒していくゲームだと思う。
が、今のAPEXはなんだ？
１人のレジェンドだけですべての戦況を覆したり、他のレジェンドの存在が要らなくなるような調整ばかり、弱いレジェンドは放置
まだそれなら少し許せなくもない、ヘムロック？RE45？何あれ
ヘムロックのブリーチはエイムアシストが切れるようになった。
RE45なんかダメージおかしい、エイムアシストCに捕まったらほぼ確実にダウン
なんだそれ
そんなにPADを優遇したいならもうキーマウがプレイできないようにしたらいいんじゃない？
シーズンが経つごとにおかしな方向に舵を切る
なんで弱いデバイスを強くするんだ？
なんでこっちが気を遣わなきゃいけないんだ？
弱いデバイスは弱くていいんだよ
だから面白くねぇんだよ

review_english: Cheating is considered a problem, but the problem is that it is difficult to distinguish between cheats and PAD.It is no exaggeration to say that the official system is creating cheats.Legends like Alter and Axel.What do you think of legends like Alter and Axel?I think it's a game where you use ultimates to defeat the enemy.But what is APEX now?It's full of adjustments such that one legend can overturn the entire battle situation, or the existence of other legends is no longer needed. Leave the weak legends alone. If that's the case, then I can't forgive him. Hemlock RE45 What's wrong? Hemlock's Breach now cuts off aim assist. RE45's damage is weird. If you get caught by aim assist C, you're almost guaranteed to go down. What the heck? If you want to give PAD that much preferential treatment, why don't you just make it so that Keemaw can't play anymore? Every season goes in a weird direction. Why are you making weak devices stronger? Why should we care? Weak devices are fine with being weak. That's why it's not interesting.

review:
Acho que Apex Legends foi o battle royale mais desbalanceado que eu já joguei na minha vida. O matchmaking não tem nenhum critério a ponto de você ficar por um bom tempo trocando tiro com algum squad pra chegar algum viciado ou hacker que não tem nada haver com a troca e simplesmente matar ambos com extrema facilidade.

Não consegui entender muito bem mas aparentemente é "permitido" macro e se utilizar de alguns bugs pra movimentação, nas primeiras horas o meu contato com esses jogadores foi o equivalente a um ser pré-histórico descobrindo o fogo: eu simplesmente não entendi NADA.

Da pra ganhar no tiro mas isso não é o suficiente, tem o kit de armas do meta que basicamente 99% do servidor vai usar. Eu tentei não seguir esses padrões e virei um café com leite no squad enquanto esperava meus amigos me carregarem.

Não consegui entender muito bem mas aparentemente é "permitido" macro e se utilizar de alguns bugs pra movimentação, nas primeiras horas o meu contato com esses jogadores foi o equivalente a um ser pré-histórico descobrindo o fogo eu simplesmente não entendi NADA. Da pra ganhar no tiro mas isso não é o suficiente, tem o kit de armas do meta que basicamente 99 do servidor vai usar. Eu tentei não seguir esses padrões e virei um café com leite no squad enquanto esperava meus amigos me carregarem.
review_english: I think Apex Legends was the most unbalanced battle royale I've ever played in my life. Matchmaking has no criteria to the point where you can spend a long time exchanging fire with a squad for some addict or hacker to arrive who has nothing to do with the exchange and simply kill them both with extreme ease. I couldn't understand it very well but apparently macros are "allowed" and using some bugs for movement, in the first hours my contact with these players was the equivalent of a prehistoric being discovering fire, I simply didn't understand ANYTHING. You can win in shooting but that's not enough, there's the meta weapon kit that basically 99 people on the server will use. I tried not to follow these patterns and became a latte in the squad while waiting for my friends to carry me.

review:
強い敵にやられた、プレデターにひき殺されたやられたと思ったら9割PAD。やられた後の観戦での視点の動きデスボの漁り方でわかる。とりあえずエイムアシストを弱くしてくれないと面白くない。キーマウの努力が報われない。PADのほうが人口が多いのおかしいと思った方がいい。半々になる努力をしてください。ていうかエイムアシストじゃなくてキャラコンアシストでいいんじゃないですか？キーマウの優位なところはキャラクターの操作性にあると思います。なのでPADでそれをカバーできるようにキャラコンにアシストをすればいい。まんぶーはPAD専用にするとか。
そもそもPC版なんだから、キーマウでやるのが普通になるべき。PADでやりたいのならPS4や5のサーバーでやればいい。PC版のゲームを順当にキーマウでプレーしてる方が淘汰されてるのはおかしすぎる。うまいPADの方はエイムアシストのない、スモーク中でも 当ててくる。エイムアシストがなくても敵を倒せる事実がある時点でアシストはいらない。アシストがないほうがPADプレイヤーの差別化もできていいと思う。今は、エイムアシストのせいで、みんな当てすぎ。戦ってる最中にPADってわかるような当て感。おかしい。まじで。PADのほうが多いからあんまり問題にならんかもしれんがもとはPCのゲーム、PADのエイムアシストをどうにかしろ。あと、大会とか見ててもPADの視点には華がない。
あとPS4や5の方たちのエイムアシストが強い。おかしい。PC鯖に来てるのだから、チャレンジャーとしてもっと弱くあるべき。運営はバランスをとれてると思ってるかもしれないが全く取れていない。
あともう一つ、マッチングシステムがおかしいプラチナ部隊とプレ部隊がマッチングしてるのを見かけるが、本来パーティーで組めないランク差があるのにマッチングで敵にプレが来るプラチナがあまりにもかわいそう。あと、何回も繰り返して申し訳ないが、ダイヤ3、4でプレとマッチングすんのもやめろ。

この少数派の意見は、どうにもならないだろうが、愚痴を書かせてもらった。ここまで読んでくれた方がいたら感謝します。マッチングの合間に書いたので、文章ぐちゃぐちゃですが許してください。

review_english: I was killed by a strong enemy I was run over by a Predator When I thought I was attacked, 90% of the time PAD is used.The movement of the viewpoint when watching after being attacked can be seen by how to hunt for Deathbo.For now, it won't be fun unless you weaken the aim assist.Keemaw's efforts are not rewarded.You should think that it's strange that PAD has a higher population.Please try to make it evenly split.I mean, wouldn't it be better to use character contact assist instead of aim assist? I think the advantage of Keymaw is in the operability of the character, so you can use PAD to compensate for that by assisting the character controller. Manbuu should be exclusive to PAD. It's a PC version in the first place, so playing with Keymaw should become the norm. If you want to play with PAD, you can do it on a PS4 or 5 server. It's strange that those who regularly play the PC version of the game with Keymaw are being weeded out. A good PAD will hit even in smoke without aim assist.As long as you can defeat the enemy even without aim assist, you don't need assist.I think it would be better to have no assist to differentiate PAD players.Nowadays, because of aim assist, everyone hits too much.You can tell it's a PAD during a fight.It's funny.Seriously, it might not be that much of a problem since there are more PADs, but originally it was a PC game. Something needs to be done about the PAD's aim assist.Also, when I watch tournaments, the PAD's point of view is lacking.Also, the aim assist of PS4 and 5 players is strong.That's strange.They should be weaker as challengers since they are coming to PC.You might think that the management is balanced, but they are not doing so at all.One more thing: The matching system is strange.I see Platinum units and pre-units being matched. I feel so sorry for the platinum player who can't normally team up with a party due to the difference in rank, but the enemy gets pre-play in matching.Also, I'm sorry to repeat this so many times, but please stop matching with pre-players with 3 and 4 diamonds.I'm sure this minority opinion won't help, but I've written a complaint.If you've read this far, I'd appreciate it.I wrote this in between matching, so please forgive me.

review:
Ich hab Apex Legends jahrelang nicht mehr angefasst. Nach den ersten paar Seasons war irgendwie die Luft raus, und ich bin zu anderen Shootern gewandert. Aber die ganzen Gerüchte, dass das Spiel "tot" sei, haben mich dann doch neugierig gemacht – also hab ich es nochmal installiert. Und was soll ich sagen? Das Ding lebt. Wirklich.

Der neue Legend ist der erste neue Charakter seit einer Weile – und der macht richtig Laune. Ein Skirmisher mit Rollen an den Beinen, der einfach nur schnell ist. Seine Fähigkeiten passen perfekt zu einem aggressiven Spielstil. High risk, high reward – genau mein Ding.

Was mich früher immer genervt hat, waren die Momente, wenn ein Teammitglied stirbt und man ewig zum Beacon rennen musste. Das ist jetzt Geschichte. Es gibt einen Deathbox-Respawn – du kannst deine Kumpels direkt da wiederbeleben, wo sie gefallen sind. Das Game ist einfach schneller, flüssiger, weniger totes Herumstehen. Das merkt man in jedem Match.

Technisch läuft es bei mir jetzt butterweich. Früher hatte Apex auf manchen Systemen seltsame Probleme – die sind weg. Die Optik wurde aufpoliert, bessere Beleuchtung, flüssigere Schatten. Insgesamt einfach runder als früher.

Ganz eitel Sonnenschein ist es aber nicht. Gerade die Hardcore-Spieler meckern viel. Sie sagen, dass die Entwickler oft Änderungen einführen, die keiner versteht, und das Feedback der Community nicht richtig umgesetzt wird. Besonders im Ranked-Bereich fühlen sich viele im Stich gelassen – das Matchmaking ist nicht immer fair, und Server-Probleme gibt es auch ab und zu. Auch Cheater sind leider nie ganz verschwunden.

Wenn du, wie ich, das Spiel mal aus den Augen verloren hast, ist jetzt ein guter Zeitpunkt zurückzukehren. Es fühlt sich frisch an, die neuen Inhalte machen Laune, und die technischen Verbesserungen sind spürbar. Klar, für absolute Competitive-Hardcore-Spieler mag da noch Luft nach oben sein, aber für alle anderen ist Apex Legends gerade in einer guten Verfassung.

Mit Freunden im Team macht es einfach süchtig – dieses "eine Runde noch, ich schwör, es ist die letzte"-Gefühl ist zurück. Wer einen actionreichen, taktischen Shooter sucht und Bock auf schnelle Baller-Action hat, sollte mal reinschauen. Der Zug ist noch lange nicht abgefahren.

review_english: I haven't touched Apex Legends in years. After the first few seasons I kind of ran out of steam and moved on to other shooters. But all the rumors that the game was "dead" made me curious so I installed it again. And what can I say? The thing is alive. Really. The new Legend is the first new character in a while and he's really fun. A skirmisher with wheels on the legs that is simply fast. His skills are a perfect fit for an aggressive playing style. High risk, high reward is exactly my thing. What always annoyed me were the moments when a team member dies and you have to run forever to the beacon. That's history now. There is a deathbox respawn you can revive your buddies right where they fell. The game is simply faster, smoother, and less standing around. You notice that in every match. Technically, things are running smoothly for me now. Apex used to have strange problems on some systems, but they are gone. The optics have been polished, better lighting, smoother shadows. Overall just rounder than before. But it's not all sunshine and roses. Hardcore players in particular complain a lot. They say that developers often introduce changes that no one understands and community feedback is not properly implemented. Especially in the ranked area, many people feel let down - matchmaking is not always fair, and there are server problems from time to time. Unfortunately, cheaters have never completely disappeared either. If, like me, you lost sight of the game, now is a good time to return. It feels fresh, the new content is fun, and the technical improvements are noticeable. Sure, there may still be room for improvement for absolute competitive hardcore players, but for everyone else, Apex Legends is in good shape right now. With friends on the team it's simply addictive, that "one more round, I swear it's the last" feeling is back. If you're looking for an action-packed, tactical shooter and are up for some fast-paced shooting action, you should take a look. The train hasn't left yet.

review:
This game has gripped my life since its release back in 2019. For a few years there, this was the only game I was playing on my Xbox. 

I will say, respawn truly has made something special here. The gunplay, the movement, the abilities, and even the sound when you knock someone hits like crack. It’s so satisfying, and I haven’t been able to find another game that compares. 

That being said, this game has issues. My main gripes with Apex include:

1. This game brings out the worst in humanity. Apex has an extremely toxic player base that act like their life depends on winning a match. No one has compassion for each other.

2. Ranked has never been balanced properly, and the Devs do not listen to what their community wants.

3. This game is not fun to play without friends. Apex is not friendly to new players and has a steep learning curve, so anyone you try to introduce to this game is cooked.

review:
このゲームの良いところと悪いところを何個か。

良いとこ
腐ってもfpsの一角なだけあり、プレイ人口が多くマッチが早い。
知名度があるので友達を呼びやすい。

悪いとこ
バグがかなり多い。　
索敵するキャラの索敵が機能不全になり早何週間、いまだ直らず。
毎シーズン変わるたびになぜか新しいバグがかわるがわる出てきて不快、なぜか直るのは二つ前のシーズンのバグだったり、永遠に放置されていたり。
毎シーズン絶対にクラッシュするサーバー
バグが発生しているのにゲーム内でバグの詳細は分からず。

運営がしたいことがわからない。
EAなだけあってカスみたいな調整を連発する。
遠距離復活能力強いから没収ね！はわかるがそのあとより強い遠距離復活能力持ちキャラを出す意図がわからん。
不遇キャラは一生不遇、籠城系キャラは使うだけで戦犯。
HPバーが追加された影響で分身キャラが本体丸見え。
移動力インフレ環境のインフレキャラ欄にいる爆弾飛ばすキャラ、移動力？？？？
やたらめったらにキャラに追加されるLGBT、なのに一番強いのは義足ヤク中。
多様性アピールをする割にはキャラはどのパーティも固定、ファッション多様性
なんで健常者いないんだ？

もはや意味をなしてないキャラ背景
兄弟を見つけ故郷に帰るために参戦したキャラの兄弟も参戦、早く帰れ。
息子とはぐれたキャラが息子のもとに帰るための研究をするため参戦、デスゲームしてないで研究に没頭してろ。
なんかいるテロリスト、はよ捕まれ。
追加される属性に対し内容がスカスカ、できないなら最初から追加するなよ。

不遇なのはキャラだけでなくキーマウも、このゲームで勝つ一番簡単な方法はPADを買うこと。
エイムアシストが本当に強い、キーマウはキャラコンが～みたいな意見もあるが最近はお手軽キャラコンなるもの
が追加されてPADでもキャラコンが使えるようになりますます不利に。
運営は調整します！！と言ってから何年もたち。

やたらサブ垢が多い、いないとは思うがこれから新規になるつもりの人はやめておけ、周りの初心者は多分初心者ではなくサブ垢、理不尽に一方的に虐殺されるゲーム。やるだけ無駄。

review_english: What are some good and bad points about this game? Good points: Even if it's rotten, it's only part of the FPS game. There are a lot of players, and matches are fast. It's easy to invite friends because it's well-known. Bad points: There are quite a lot of bugs. The character searching for enemies has been malfunctioning for several weeks now, and it still hasn't been fixed. Every season, for some reason, new bugs keep popping up and it's annoying. The server always crashes every season Even though there are bugs, we don't know the details of the bugs in the game.We don't know what the management wants to do.As it's EA, they keep making crappy adjustments.They confiscated them because they have a strong long-distance resurrection ability.I understand, but I don't understand the intention of releasing a character with a stronger long-distance resurrection ability.Unfortunate characters are unlucky for the rest of their lives.Castle-type characters are war criminals just by using them.Duplicate characters can see their main bodies completely due to the addition of HP bars. Mobility A character who throws bombs in the inflation character column in an inflationary environment Mobility A character who is randomly added to the list of characters LGBT, but the strongest one is a prosthetic-legged gang member In order to appeal to diversity, the characters are fixed in every party Fashion diversity Why are there no able-bodied characters? Character backgrounds that no longer make sense A brother of a character who joined the war to find his brother and return to his hometown also participates in the war Go home quickly A character separated from his son joins the war to do research in order to return to his son. Don't play a death game, concentrate on your research. Those terrorists are caught. The content is sparse compared to the added attributes. If you can't do it, don't add it from the beginning. It's not just the characters that are unlucky, but the Key Maw as well. The easiest way to win in this game is to buy a PAD. Aim assist is really strong. Some people say that the Key Maw is a character control, but recently, easy-to-use character controls have been added, and you can use character controls on the PAD. Management will adjust. review:
Over 1500 hours with a max of 400 hours of enjoyment. I still play this game because there are only 2 relevant battle royale games: this and Skyscraper Building Simulator, where you need to own a server in your house to take a wall from an unemployed dropout with no purpose in life.

The good things about this game:

1. ABSOLUTELY NOTHING (for now, I guess).
2. In the past, the permanent Arena mode and the occasional Solo mode were the only game modes that I enjoyed playing.

Let's start with the truth:
1. The servers are ass.
2. Half the players are using Zen, configs, scripts, etc. (they are mostly common in LTMs and Ranked).
3. You can have over 4k hours and play Ranked in Diamond lobbies, and this game still manages to put on your team 2 level 50 kids or some mentally ill stupid-ass human whose only purpose in life is to ragebait you.
4. The map rotation makes no sense.
5. The Ranked system makes no sense (they punish solo queue Diamond players and reward 3-stacking Preds).
6. CONSOLE PLAYERS!!!

In conclusion? Just drink a few shots of vodka with beers before you hop into a Ranked match just to annihilate any sense of regret that appears after a maximum of 5 minutes of playing this miraculous game.

review:
Apex Legends ranked mode has become one of the most frustrating competitive experiences I’ve played.

The rank reset system is terrible. Apex Predators, the highest rank in the game, get pushed all the way down to Gold after resets. Because of that, Masters and Diamonds get pushed into Silver and lower ranks too. Regular players end up fighting people way above their actual skill level just because of this terrible reset design. Ranked is supposed to separate players by skill, not throw everyone together at the start of every split.

The party rank system is also easily abused. Apex Predators can queue with lower-ranked Diamond players and get into easier lobbies than they should. The solution is simple: matchmaking should always be based on the highest-ranked player in the squad. Almost every competitive game already understands this.

Audio is another massive issue that somehow still isn’t fixed. Enemy footsteps randomly disappear even when players are extremely close. It’s honestly embarrassing that a multi-million dollar company still has audio problems like this after so many years. The recent update made it even worse because Octane, who should have loud footsteps due to his speed, is now strangely quiet.

And that’s without even talking about controller dominance becoming the norm. Aim assist is so strong that it removes much of the difficulty of recoil control and close-range tracking, making fights feel less skill-based for mouse and keyboard players.

The movement and gunplay are still great, but ranked integrity, broken audio, and questionable balancing decisions continue to drag the game down.

review_english: For me, Apex Legends remains a big favorite because the fight is really fast-paced and feels brutally good to this day, but the matchmaking has gotten worse from season to season (and I say this because I've been playing since season 2). Somewhere around the 10th season, the situation started to get worse. When I started, I ran around with 8-9 kills to bronze, silver, even gold rank, and now the game puts me in bronze with people I only met in season 2 in platinum rank. review:
Juego bastante a los Battle Royale y uno de los que más horas le metí fue Apex Legends. Entre Steam y Origin debo tener unas 300 horas aproximadamente, y sinceramente puedo decir que fue uno de los juegos que más me costó aprender a jugar “bien”.

A diferencia de otros Battle Royale como Warzone, PUBG o incluso Counter cuando hablamos de shooters competitivos, Apex tiene una movilidad y un gameplay muchísimo más rápido y complicado. El tema de las habilidades, el movimiento, el tiempo para matar y las peleas súper frenéticas hacen que sea bastante difícil dominarlo. De hecho, es de esos juegos que, aunque le metas muchísimas horas, sentís que nunca terminás de aprender del todo. Personalmente es uno de los shooters que jamás pude llegar a dominar aunque sea un poco, y justamente eso también hace que tenga algo especial.

Algo que sí siento es que Apex es un juego prácticamente hecho para jugar con amigos. Obviamente podés jugar solo, pero la experiencia cambia muchísimo cuando entrás con squad y buena comunicación. No es como CS, PUBG o Warzone donde capaz podés carrear más individualmente o jugar tranquilo solo; acá el trabajo en equipo y coordinar habilidades es demasiado importante.

Dentro de los Battle Royale, Apex sigue siendo bastante único comparado a los demás. La movilidad, los personajes y el ritmo de las partidas hacen que se sienta totalmente distinto. Pero también tiene varios puntos negativos. Uno bastante molesto es el hecho de no poder jugar realmente solo dentro del modo principal, porque dependés muchísimo del squad y muchas veces te terminan tocando compañeros que ni hablan o se van apenas los matan.

Y otro problema grande es que hoy en día la mayoría de jugadores son demasiado buenos. Se nota muchísimo que ya casi no hay jugadores nuevos, entonces muchas partidas terminan siendo bastante complicadas incluso para gente que ya tiene horas encima. A veces parece que todos juegan como si estuvieran en ranked competitivo y eso puede hacer que aprender o simplemente relajarse jugando sea medio frustrante.

Aun así, Apex me parece un juegazo y probablemente uno de los Battle Royale más originales que salieron en los últimos años. Tiene una jugabilidad increíble, peleas súper intensas y momentos que posta son muy divertidos cuando jugás con amigos. Es difícil, sí, pero justamente eso también hace que cuando una partida sale bien se sienta muchísimo más satisfactoria.

Nota: 7/10.

review_english: I play Battle Royale a lot and one of the ones I put the most hours into was Apex Legends. Between Steam and Origin I must have approximately 300 hours, and I can honestly say that it was one of the games that was most difficult for me to learn to play well. Unlike other Battle Royales like Warzone, PUBG or even Counter when we talk about competitive shooters, Apex has much faster and more complicated mobility and gameplay. The theme of skills, movement, time to kill and super frantic fights make it quite difficult to master. In fact, it is one of those games that, even if you put many hours into it, you feel like you never fully finish learning. Personally, it is one of the shooters that I could never master even a little, and that is precisely what also makes it have something special. One thing I do feel is that Apex is a game practically made to play with friends. Obviously you can play alone, but the experience changes a lot when you enter with a squad and good communication. It's not like CS, PUBG or Warzone where you can race more individually or play calmly alone, here teamwork and coordinating skills are very important. Within the Battle Royale, Apex is still quite unique compared to the others. The mobility, the characters and the pace of the games make it feel totally different. But it also has several negative points. One that is quite annoying is the fact that you can't really play alone in the main mode, because you depend a lot on the squad and many times you end up with teammates who don't even speak or leave as soon as you kill them. And another big problem is that nowadays most players are too good. It is very noticeable that there are almost no new players, so many games end up being quite complicated even for people who already have hours of experience. Sometimes it seems like everyone is playing as if they are in competitive ranked and that can make learning or just relaxing while playing somewhat frustrating. Even so, Apex seems like a great game to me and probably one of the most original Battle Royales to come out in recent years. It has incredible gameplay, super intense fights and moments that are very fun when you play with friends. It's difficult, yes, but that's exactly what makes it feel much more satisfying when a game goes well. Note 7 10.

review:
I used to love this game. I have hundreds of hours on the EA launcher back in 2018 and 2019. This game was great, fun and just a good time. Of course as things go, you take breaks from games at some point. 

So i took a break until 2025 and then tried the game again... Well what can I say, it just doesn't feel the same. The game is full of micro transactions and unnecessary cosmetic meant to grab your wallet. And I mean I know all games are like that today, I still hate it though. It feels soul-less and predatory.

The gameplay itself i guess hasn't changed from what I can tell, however somehow it feels a lot less fun and engaging than what it used to be. Not sure what it is, but I left the game feeling rather bored and unsatisfied.

I don't know... I wanna like this game as it used to be one of my favorites to play with my friends, but something must have changed during my 6 years of absence that now it just makes it unappealing.
I probably will not be hopping back on Apex. Maybe I'll give it another shot in the future, but chaces are the 2018 feel is gone forever.

review:
I've played Apex Legends on the PS4 way back when it was still in Season 0 and I quit playing at around Season 4. I've recently picked up the game again in hopes it might've picked itself back up, but no, the game fell off. 

The gameplay mechanics feel like they're throwing things at the wall and hoping something sticks, the gunplay feels off from how I remembered it, and I don't even have some of the legends I used to have even after linking accounts (I think I'm missing Revenant and another legend). Every match feels like a drag and the ranking system feels tacked on and forgotten about.

The community is very toxic too. I was trash talked for not having Newcastle as a returning player and a player insulted my mother after he died far away from me and another teammate and I died trying to get his banner.

Overall, it's not worth coming back to no matter how much money you've spent in the past. If you want to play a game like Apex, just play Farlight instead. The game has less players and the lobbies can feel harder, but the gunplay feels much better and the abilities feel more fun to learn and play around. 

TLDR: Apex bad because bad gameplay and bad community. Play Farlight instead.

review: I've played this game quite a lot for a mostly-casual player (probably around double what the steam playtime shows since I started on the EA client all the way back when Apex was brand new, I remember Octane and Wattson coming out, I've *been* been here), the fact that almost 2 years ago now they put a blanket blacklist on all Linux players to "prevent cheating" and it's still in effect to this day is what drove the decision to leave a negative review. I've dual-booted for a while, still played occasionally after the Linux exclusion and the number of cheaters has not lessened as far as you can tell while playing. But what did lessen? Number of overall Windows users. And yet, the blanket ban still remains. I don't use Windows to game anymore. A lot of Linux players never did. And a lot of us have spent a lot of time playing this game prior to October 2024. We should not be forced to choose between forfeiting whatever reason a given Linux user has for using their OS or forfeiting a game we used to enjoy. Initially there was still hope maybe once they're proven wrong, they'd revert their decision, but that does not seem likely by now. I don't know if they're just allergic to admitting they made a bad choice, but this blacklist is such a weird hill for Respawn to die on, especially with the success of the SteamDeck and now with the Steam Machine on the horizon, you'd think they'd at the very least care more about securing these players.

review:
Apex Legends es, entretenido, un juego que ya ha tenido sus arreglos, aunque aun faltan algunas cosas por solucionar, el sistema de match, los jugadores trolls y toxicos.
Lamentablemente no es muy amigable para los jugadores casuales, ni novatos, si eres nuevo o buscas una experiencia relajada, te vas a encontrar con un problema de habilidad. No es muy amigable empezando y el sistema de match no ayuda, al igual que el serio problema de smurfs y hackers que tiene.
* Toxicidad persistente: Existen un problema serio con la comunidad que el estudio aun no logra resolver y ellos mismos admiten si les envias un correo o un reporte sobre algun jugador siendo toxico, o con un mal comportamiento en el voice chat, al igual que si respondes por el canal de texto, se puede malinterpretar y recibir el reporte por que no revisan el voice chat donde la mayoría de jugadores tóxicos aprovechan para insultar y esperar que les respondas, igualmente es un vacío legal que la propia dev confirma que no les interesa revisar, dejando vía libre a que flamen, en pocas palabras el vice chat se diría como "tierra de nadie". Al no estar vigilado de la misma forma, los jugadores smurf, al igual que trolls, solamente hostigaran y insultaran sin miedo a represalias. Ya parte de ellos saben que el sistema no registra el voice chat, a menos que lo grabes y envíes, pero seguramente un bot automatizado lo atenderá y no llegara a nada, a si generándose un ambiente toxico del cual se aprovechan constantemente. Realmente no merece la pena tener el voice chat activo, el juego cuenta con un sistema de comunicación lo suficientemente completo para dar a entender acciones.
Si eres nuevo, te recomiendo silenciar/mutear a tu equipo, al igual que si ya tienes tiempo jugando y vuelves a reincorporarte sin saber esto de ante mano. No lo recomiendo para jugadores que buscan una experiencia competitiva sana o casual.

review_english: Apex Legends is, entertaining, a game that has already had its fixes, although there are still some things to solve, the match system, the trolls and toxic players. Unfortunately it is not very friendly for casual players or novices, if you are new or looking for a relaxed experience, you are going to encounter a skill problem. It's not very friendly starting out and the match system doesn't help, as does the serious problem of smurfs and hackers it has. Persistent toxicity There is a serious problem with the community that the studio has not yet been able to solve and they themselves admit if you send them an email or a report about a player being toxic, or with bad behavior in the voice chat, just as if you respond through the text channel, it can be misinterpreted and the report can be received because they do not review the voice chat where the majority of toxic players take the opportunity to insult and expect you to respond, it is also a legal loophole that the dev herself confirms that they are not interested in reviewing, leaving free way for them to flame, in a few words the vice chat could be said as "no man's land". Not being monitored in the same way, smurf players, like trolls, will only harass and insult without fear of retaliation. Some of them already know that the system does not record the voice chat, unless you record and send it, but surely an automated bot will attend to it and it will come to nothing, generating a toxic environment from which they constantly take advantage. It's really not worth having the voice chat active, the game has a communication system complete enough to imply actions. If you are new, I recommend muting your team, as well as if you have been playing for a while and rejoin without knowing this beforehand. I don't recommend it for players looking for a healthy or casual competitive experience.

review: I remember when i first downloaded apex back in S3 when one of my cousins told me about it. Immediately i was all in the gladiator esk like vibe, the grounded more slow paced version of Titanfall's gameplay, the legends, the guns, the story. I feel bad for games like Apex man at it's core on paper it is a phenomenal and pretty darn good game. I can see why some people come back after a while. But i can also see why a lot of people talk straight bad about it and some of those reasons are most definitely the reasons why i left. I'd say my top 3 are the matchmaking, EA, and the live service model which in all honesty is holding a lot these games back to be honest. I mean how good would be Apex be if it wasn't a live service game, if it wasn't poorly owned, if it's matchmaking didn't make it feel like a job a good portion of time rather than a game. We could of had Apex legends at it's fullest potential and Titanfall 3.

review:
5/25/26
Over the course of a 2 hour session I encountered 7 players using aim-bot, and numerous connectivity issues which have negatively impacted my enjoyment of this game. Over the past few years of playing this game, console aim-assist, rampant cheater infestations, worsening connectivity issues, ability creep, and a general lack of foresight from developers has negatively impacted my enjoyment of this game. 

I will not be returning to this game due to these issues. Yes, some of these are personal preferences/opinions, while some are the fault of Respawn and EA. This game has lost its soul, and I cant force myself to enjoy this like I used to. I have been a fairly active player since 2020, and for me its sad to say goodbye to, what was/could've been, the best FPS out there. Adios, amigos.

review:
#简评
优点
1. 射击、机动手感顶尖，对局节奏快，进化护甲鼓励正面交战。
2. 英雄技能搭配玩法丰富，三人小队战术性强，Ping系统方便组队沟通。
3. 核心玩法免费，氪金不影响平衡，赛季持续更新内容。
4. 有复活机制，上手简单、操作上限高，单局耗时短。
缺点
1. 无国服，国内游玩需加速器，常出现卡顿、丢包。
2. PC端外挂、炸鱼问题依旧存在。
3. 英雄、排位平衡时有争议，部分皮肤定价偏高。
4. 后期新玩法创新不足，内容偏同质化。
总结
玩法质量顶尖的战术竞技FPS，但网络、外挂、运营是明显短板。如果你能接受小毛病，它仍是当前最好玩的 FPS 大逃杀，没有之一。

review_english: Brief review Advantages 1. Shooting and maneuverability are top-notch. The game is fast-paced. Evolved armor encourages head-to-head combat. 2. Rich combination of hero skills. Three-person team is highly tactical. The Ping system facilitates team communication. 3. The core gameplay is free. Krypton gold does not affect the balance. Continuously updated content during the season. 4. There is a resurrection mechanism. It is easy to get started. The operation limit is high. A single game takes a short time. Disadvantages: 1. No national server. Domestic play requires an accelerator. Frequent lags and packet loss 2. The problem of cheating on the PC side still exists. 3. There is controversy over the hero ranking balance. Some skins are priced too high. 4. Insufficient innovation in new gameplay in the later period and the content is homogeneous. Summary: It is a tactical competitive FPS with top-notch gameplay quality, but the network, plug-in and operation are obvious shortcomings. If you can accept the minor problems, it is still the most fun FPS battle royale currently. There is no one.

review: If you're looking for a shooter with the slickest dynamics out there, this is it. Apex isn't just about running and gunning; it’s about the feel of every slide, every jump, and every movement. The TTK (time-to-kill) is spot on — it actually gives you a chance to outplay your opponents with pure skill, even if they get the drop on you.The legends are a blast. Each has unique abilities that genuinely impact the game rather than just being window dressing. The teamwork, the insane pace, and the constant adrenaline rush are unmatched. Sure, the servers can be a pain sometimes, but once you drop in and start slaying, nothing else matters. Hands down the best battle royale on the market right now. The game is freaking awesome, no contest!

review: Прикольно, но то еще говнище. Бан от клоунов РКН очень сладко накладываются на абсолютно убогие сервера, из-за чего играть становится еще противнее(это если вообще запустило в матч). В добавок идут бездарные и тупые тиммейты, которым еще и токсичности не занимать. Про баланс вообще молчу, идиоты бафают персонажа, когда на него выходит новенький скинчик стоимостью в отдельную хорошую игру, а в следующем сезоне его настолько сильно нерфят, что играть просто невозможно становится. Карты просто полный ужас, 75% дня мап пул полное говнище, состоящий из отстойных карт по типу олимпа и "Квартала ЭЫЭЫЭЫ", которые большинству уже просто невероятно надоели. А донат работает по отработанной схеме из сотен других подобных игр: покупается только визуал(единственное адекватное стоит ужасных денег). Да, его можно приобрести за "Металлы", но большинство из предоставленных приколов выглядит так плохо, что хочется выйти из игры, а все, что ниже легендарного выглядит еще хуже. И персонажи, которых либо ты покупаешь за свои кровные, либо сидишь сутками в игре, чтобы открыть одного, которого через день превратят в беспомощного инвалида. Да, раз в сезон тебе сбросят сотню монеток с барского стола, на которые можно купить кейсик по акционочке с которого выпадет самая отсталая анимация на бесполезного персонажа. А так побегать пострелять прикольно и весело

review:
Tytuł: Symulator bycia kurierem sprzętu dla 14-letnich spocących się dzieciaków

Treść:
Odpalasz Apexa pełen nadziei na dobry mecz. Gra litościwie paruje cię z dwoma losowymi "pro-playerami". Pierwszy to oczywiście Wraith z dopiskiem TTV w nicku, która w ułamku sekundy odłącza się od oddziału w trakcie lotu, ląduje w najgęściej zaludnionym budynku na mapie, dostaje w ryj z pistoletu na wodę, po czym robi "disconnect" z prędkością światła – jeszcze zanim jej wirtualne ciało zdąży dotknąć ziemi.

Drugi kolega z drużyny to gość, który najwyraźniej gra na kierownicy od Pegasusa, a przez jego wiecznie włączony mikrofon słyszysz odkurzacz, szczekającego psa i awanturę rodzinną w nieznanym narzeczu.

Zostajesz sam. Postanawiasz grać taktycznie. Biegasz po pustkowiach przez 15 minut jak jakiś zbieracz złomu. Kolekcjonujesz fioletowe i złote dodatki, masz ulubioną broń, zapas apteczek i czerwony pancerz. Czujesz się jak chodzący czołg, gotowy wygrać mistrzostwa świata. Nagle słyszysz strzały i myślisz: "To jest ten moment".

Zbliżasz się do walki, ale zanim w ogóle zdążysz wcisnąć lewy przycisk myszy, z nieba spada na ciebie naszprycowany stymulantami Octane, a tuż za nim Horizon wykręcająca fikołki pod sufitem. Gra natychmiast zamienia się w festiwal "third-party", gdzie nagle z każdej strony magicznie pojawiają się cztery inne ekipy. Padasz w ułamku sekundy, uświadamiając sobie smutną prawdę: przez kwadrans grałeś po prostu w symulator kuriera DPD, żeby z największą starannością wyfarmić i dostarczyć swój cenny loot jakiemuś e-sportowemu napinaczowi, który nie widział trawy od premiery trzeciego sezonu.

Nie zapominajmy o wisience na torcie – serwerach EA napędzanych chomikiem w kołowrotku, przez które twój strzał ze strzelby prosto w klatkę piersiową przeciwnika z odległości pół metra zada potężne, niszczycielskie 9 punktów obrażeń.

10/10, doskonała produkcja dla osób, które muszą szybko i skutecznie podnieść sobie ciśnienie bez użycia farmakologii.

Drugi kolega z drużyny to gość, który najwyraźniej gra na kierownicy od Pegasusa, a przez jego wiecznie włączony mikrofon słyszysz odkurzacz, szczekającego psa i awanturę rodzinną w nieznanym narzeczu. Gra natychmiast zamienia się w festiwal "third-party", gdzie nagle z każdej strony magicznie pojawiają się cztery inne ekipy. Padasz w ułamku sekundy, uświadamiając sobie smutną prawdę przez kwadrans grałeś po prostu w symulator kuriera DPD, żeby z największą starannością wyfarmić i dostarczyć swój cenny loot jakiemuś e-sportowemu napinaczowi, który nie widział trawy od premiery trzeciego sezonu. review_english: Title Simulator of being a courier of equipment for 14-year-old sweaty kids Content You start Apex, hoping for a good match. The game mercifully pairs you with two random "pro-players". The first is, of course, Wraith with the note TTV in its nickname, which disconnects from the unit in a split second during the flight, lands in the most densely populated building on the map, gets hit in the face with a water gun, and then "disconnects" at the speed of light before its virtual body even touches the ground. The second teammate is a guy who apparently plays on the Pegasus steering wheel, and through his always-on microphone you can hear a vacuum cleaner, a barking dog and a family quarrel in an unknown dialect. You are left alone. You decide to play tactically. You run around the wasteland for 15 minutes like some scrap collector. You collect purple and gold accessories, you have your favorite weapon, a stock of first aid kits and red armor. You feel like a walking tank, ready to win the world championship. Suddenly you hear gunshots and you think, "This is the moment." You are getting close to the fight, but before you can even press the left mouse button, Octane, full of stimulants, falls from the sky, followed by Horizon, doing somersaults under the ceiling. The game immediately turns into a "third-party" festival, where suddenly four other teams magically appear on each side. You fall down in a split second, realizing the sad truth. You were simply playing the DPD courier simulator for a quarter of an hour to farm and deliver your precious loot with the greatest care to some e-sports pro who hasn't seen grass since the premiere of the third season. Let's not forget about the icing on the cake of EA's hamster-wheel-powered servers, where your shotgun blast straight into an opponent's chest from half a meter away will deal a massive, devastating 9 points of damage. 10 10, an excellent product for people who need to quickly and effectively raise their blood pressure without the use of pharmacology.

review: 《Apex英雄》是一款玩法出众但问题突出的战术竞技FPS，依托扎实的射击手感、丰富的英雄技能与立体身法体系，搭配复活机制、智能标记等人性化设计，战术深度和对局乐趣拉满，电竞生态也十分成熟；但PC端外挂泛滥、服务器不稳、匹配机制失衡、入门门槛高，再加上氪金与BUG等问题，大幅影响游玩体验，适合喜欢硬核竞技、能接受短板且有队友开黑的玩家，休闲玩家慎入。
review_clean: Apex英雄 是一款玩法出众但问题突出的战术竞技FPS 依托扎实的射击手感 丰富的英雄技能与立体身法体系 搭配复活机制 智能标记等人性化设计 战术深度和对局乐趣拉满 电竞生态也十分成熟 但PC端外挂泛滥 服务器不稳 匹配机制失衡 入门门槛高 再加上氪金与BUG等问题 大幅影响游玩体验 适合喜欢硬核竞技 能接受短板且有队友开黑的玩家 休闲玩家慎入
review_english: Apex Legends is a tactical competitive FPS with outstanding gameplay but outstanding problems. It relies on a solid shooting feel, rich hero skills and three-dimensional movement system, with a resurrection mechanism, smart markers and other humanized designs. The tactics are deep and the fun of the game is full. The e-sports ecosystem is also very mature. However, there are many cheats on the PC side. The server is unstable. The matching mechanism is unbalanced. The entry barrier is high. In addition, problems such as krypton gold and BUG greatly affect the gaming experience. （有感而发超长无意义碎碎念，注意避雷）
我先承认，十分羞愧，我的游戏时长断断续续加起来只有不到100小时，但我还是想说两句
实话说，今年我高一，我在初中时玩过，但是当时我的技术太差了（我本来就比较习惯我的世界或者边缘世界那种比较休闲的游戏，不太喜欢射击更喜欢魂系近战），遇到人甚至都反应不过来那是人。但这一两年玩了塔科夫、三角洲、CS1.6等等游戏，枪法和脑子核反应上来之后玩APEX，体验不是一般的好。
它确实存在一些问题，外挂、土豆服务器、上手门槛高等等，但是只要尽可能地看淡，或者说是放平心态，像我一样一遍又一遍重新匹配，不断地死，终究会看见自己的提升。曾经我是真的一个人都打不到。但现在也能偶尔拿一两次捍卫者。
我真的很喜欢这款游戏，可能有人会说我是M，没被虐够，但是我就是很佛系的，玩就得了，就是打排位会注意认真点。
上手永远是最难的，塔科夫、钢4、僵毁，一堆游戏上手都是很难的，但是坚持，不断尝试，就过去了
以及最重要的，尽管我是个菜逼，甚至算是半个新人，但我认识到一件事情就是！不要压力！，给新人留一点空间，很一部分人（就排除掉射击游戏很好或者经常打别的到了APEX也照样NB的）都是从枪线都跟不上人摸过来的，匹配机制是什么样子的大家都有目共睹，新手刚完成教程开一把匹配都能遇见击杀几千几百的大佬，实力分布线常年贴在范围最低都是有的。都是从新手走过来，不要赶走新鲜血液才是让这个游戏能持续活着的重中之重，要去炸鱼去打排位也行啊（至少我听说排位就是炸鱼和被炸，赌的不是有没有挂而是这把有几队挂）.
总之——我很菜，我在努力，我确实在变强

review:
1. El Impacto de la Hipermovilidad y el "Power Creep"
Lo bueno y lo malo del ritmo actual: Es verdad que la movilidad ha evolucionado a un nivel frenético. Esto hace que las partidas sean increíblemente intensas y rápidas (lo cual es muy divertido), pero tiene un efecto colateral: la obsolescencia de los personajes clásicos.

El problema: Leyendas originales o más antiguas se han quedado atrás ante el "Power Creep" (personajes nuevos con habilidades mucho más completas y móviles). Si una leyenda no tiene una vía de escape vertical u horizontal o un posicionamiento ultra veloz, le cuesta muchísimo encajar en el meta actual.

Propuesta constructiva: En lugar de solo lanzar personajes nuevos, Respawn debería implementar un plan agresivo de reworks (rediseños) para las leyendas antiguas, actualizando sus kits para que puedan competir en igualdad de condiciones en este Apex moderno y ultra veloz.

2. La Barrera de Entrada: Desbloqueo de Leyendas demasiado lento
El problema: Aunque el juego es Free-to-Play, la economía para los jugadores nuevos o casuales es agotadora. Conseguir las 12,000 fichas de leyenda necesarias para desbloquear un solo personaje requiere demasiadas horas de juego. Con un plantel que ya supera las 25 leyendas, para alguien que empieza hoy, la meta de tenerlos a todos se siente inalcanzable y frustrante.

Propuesta constructiva:

Reducir el costo en fichas de las leyendas más antiguas (por ejemplo, que las de las primeras temporadas cuesten la mitad).

Introducir desafíos semanales específicos que recompensen directamente con fichas de leyenda o que permitan probar personajes bloqueados durante el fin de semana.

3. El Emparejamiento (Matchmaking) Roto
El problema: Esto es, sin duda, lo más "horrible" y dañino para la retención de jugadores. Que el sistema junte a un nivel 5 (que apenas está aprendiendo a apuntar y a deslizarse) en la misma partida con un Apex Predator (el top 0.1% del mundo) rompe cualquier lógica de progresión justa. No es divertido para el novato, que muere sin entender qué pasó, ni tiene sentido competitivo.

Propuesta constructiva: Implementar un "muro de contención" estricto para niveles bajos (por ejemplo, del nivel 1 al 50). Los jugadores nuevos deberían emparejarse únicamente entre ellos y con bots de entrenamiento en partidas públicas hasta que dominen las mecánicas básicas, protegiéndolos por completo de las salas de alto nivel.

review_english: 1. The Impact of Hypermobility and "Power Creep" The good and the bad of the current pace It is true that mobility has evolved to a frenetic level. This makes the games incredibly intense and fast (which is a lot of fun), but it has a side effect of making the classic characters obsolete. The problem Original or older legends have been left behind by the "Power Creep" (new characters with much more complete and mobile abilities). If a legend doesn't have a vertical or horizontal escape route or ultra-fast positioning, he or she will have a hard time fitting into the current meta. Constructive proposal Instead of just releasing new characters, Respawn should implement an aggressive rework plan for old legends, updating their kits so they can compete on equal terms in this modern and ultra-fast Apex. 2. The Barrier to Entry Unlocking Legends too slow The problem Although the game is Free-to-Play, the economy for new or casual players is exhausting. Getting the 12,000 Legend Tokens needed to unlock a single character requires too many hours of gameplay. With a roster that already exceeds 25 legends, for someone starting today, the goal of having them all feels unattainable and frustrating. Constructive proposal Reduce the cost in tokens of the oldest legends (for example, make those from the first seasons cost half). Introduce specific weekly challenges that directly reward Legend Tokens or allow you to test locked characters over the weekend. 3. Broken Matchmaking The problem This is, without a doubt, the most "horrible" thing and damaging to player retention. That the system combines a level 5 (who is just learning to aim and slide) in the same game with an Apex Predator (the top 0.1 in the world) breaks any logic of fair progression. It's not fun for the rookie, who dies without understanding what happened, nor does it make competitive sense. Constructive proposal Implement a strict "retaining wall" for low levels (for example, level 1 to 50). New players should be paired only with each other and training bots in public matches until they have mastered the basic mechanics, completely protecting them from high-level rooms.

review: This game IS NOT BEGINNER FRIENDLY! As a low-level player, the algorithm constantly throws me into lobbies with literal Apex Predators. The "Engagement-Optimized Matchmaking" (EOMM) will manipulate your games, giving you one easy lobby followed by ten matches where you get absolutely crushed by sweaty three-stacks. Save your sanity—don't bother unless you already have a full squad to play with.

review:
自2019年横空出世以来，《Apex Legends》凭借现象级的热度彻底改写了大逃杀赛道的固有格局。依托《泰坦陨落》世界观与引擎基底，Respawn跳出传统“跳伞搜装、苟活吃鸡”的同质化框架，将英雄技能体系、高速机动玩法与战术竞技深度融合，打造出一款快节奏、高自由、重配合的创新型大逃杀作品。在无数吃鸡游戏迭代消亡的浪潮中，Apex始终保持稳定热度，凭借独树一帜的游玩体验、持续优化的内容生态与成熟的竞技体系，成为当下兼顾娱乐性与竞技性的标杆级战术射击网游。
一、核心定位：英雄吃鸡，打破大逃杀的玩法桎梏
传统大逃杀游戏普遍依赖纯枪法与运气，玩法模式固化、战术单一，而《Apex Legends》精准找准品类突破口，构建了战术技能+高速机动+团队协作的全新大逃杀体系。游戏沿用经典60人跳伞缩圈的吃鸡核心规则，主打3人小队竞技，同时创新性引入英雄职业系统，彻底摆脱“人人属性相同”的传统设定，让每一局对抗都兼具枪法博弈与战术策略。
相较于PUBG等写实向慢节奏吃鸡，Apex的核心定位清晰且独特：它不追求极致拟真，而是主打轻量化、高流畅、高对抗的竞技体验。没有繁琐的配件堆叠、没有拖沓的搜装流程，地图紧凑、物资密集、转移灵活，每一局节奏高效不拖沓。同时游戏延续零数值付费的公平竞技底线，所有英雄技能、对局机制免费解锁，付费内容仅为外观皮肤，完美平衡休闲娱乐与硬核竞技，适配全层级玩家需求。
二、玩法体验：机动拉满，战术与枪法的多维博弈
1. 英雄体系：职业分化，构筑多元战术上限
英雄系统是《Apex Legends》的核心灵魂，也是区别于所有传统吃鸡游戏的核心标识。游戏拥有数十位人设、技能、定位截然不同的传奇英雄，分为突击、侦察、支援、控制四大职业，每位英雄均配备专属被动、战术技能与终极大招，技能设计贴合角色定位，无同质化模板套路。
突击英雄擅长突破拉扯、正面攻坚；侦察英雄可探测敌人信息、掌控战场视野；支援英雄主打续航抬人、团队兜底；控制英雄能够分割战场、封锁走位。小队搭配自由度极高，可自由组合攻防、拉扯、续航体系，衍生出无数战术打法。无论是路人局的灵活冲脸，还是职业赛场的精密运营，英雄技能的联动配合都能打出极强的战术效果，彻底打破了传统吃鸡“唯枪法论”的单一博弈模式，大幅拉高了游戏的战术深度。
2. 极致机动：告别笨重，重塑战场转移逻辑
继承《泰坦陨落》的机动基因，Apex拥有目前大逃杀品类中最顶尖的移动手感，彻底告别传统吃鸡的笨重走位。滑铲、蹬墙跳、高空滑翔、快速贴墙转移等轻量化机动操作，让玩家的战场走位极度灵活。无论是落地抢点、遇敌拉扯、残血撤退，还是决赛圈绕后突袭，丰富的机动手段都能让战术选择更加多元。
高机动机制带来的核心体验，是对局容错率大幅提升。玩家不再局限于定点架枪、被动对峙，可通过灵活走位规避伤害、拉扯战场节奏，新手不会因枪法劣势直接被碾压，老手则能凭借身法与操作打出极致拉扯，让每一场对战都充满动态博弈的乐趣，彻底杜绝了传统吃鸡“落地成盒、全程苟分”的枯燥体验。
3. 枪械与对局机制：流畅爽快，兼顾平衡与深度
游戏的枪械体系设计成熟均衡，手感流畅扎实，弹道反馈清晰易懂，兼顾新手上手与核心玩家钻研空间。武器分类清晰，步枪、冲锋枪、霰弹枪、狙击枪、轻机枪各司其职，适配近、中、远全距离作战场景。枪械后坐力可控性强，没有过于玄学的弹道散布，新手稍加练习即可掌握基础压枪逻辑，同时高阶的跟枪、急停、身法对枪存在足够操作上限。
值得一提的是Apex独特的长TTK机制，相较于CS:GO等短TTK一击秒杀的硬核对局，Apex角色坦度更高、对战过程更长。这一设计让对局更注重技能配合、走位拉扯与团队支援，而非单纯的枪法秒杀，极大降低了新手的瞬时挫败感，同时让团战的战术博弈过程更饱满、更有层次感。
此外，游戏独创的重生机制、队友标记系统、智能物资提示，大幅降低了团队沟通门槛。即便路人无语音交流，也能通过精准的标记系统完成报点、物资需求、战术沟通，残血队友可通过重生信标复活，避免一局失误直接出局的尴尬，大幅提升了对局的可玩性与容错率。
三、视听与世界观：科幻硬核，氛围感与辨识度兼备
依托《泰坦陨落》正统世界观，《Apex Legends》构建了独树一帜的科幻硬核星际竞技风格，世界观饱满且逻辑自洽。各大英雄的人设背景相互串联，赛事竞技、星际争夺的核心设定清晰，让每一场对局不再是单纯的对抗，而是拥有完整世界观支撑的竞技赛事，代入感十足。
视听表现上，游戏画面风格干净利落，场景建模精细，科幻风地图设计层次感丰富，从荒漠峡谷到都市空间站，每一张地图都拥有独特的地形地貌与场景特色，高低差、掩体、通道设计合理，完美适配高速机动与战术对抗。技能特效华丽但不杂乱，配色克制，不会出现特效遮挡视野的问题，兼顾视觉效果与竞技实用性。
音效设计同样表现出色，枪械射击、技能释放、脚步声、位移声分层清晰、辨识度极高，既能通过音效反馈提升对战沉浸感，也能帮助玩家听声辨位、判断战场局势。对局节奏紧凑，BGM贴合竞技氛围，全程不喧宾夺主，专注服务对局体验。
四、现存短板：迭代争议与长期痛点
尽管综合表现优异，但历经多年迭代，《Apex Legends》依然存在诸多难以忽视的短板，制约着游戏的大众普及度与长期体验。
首先是版本数值波动大，平衡性不稳定。游戏每赛季都会对英雄、枪械、配件进行大幅调整，数值起伏极其明显。强势英雄与枪械长期垄断对局环境，版本答案固化，冷门武器与英雄出场率低迷，玩家辛苦打磨的玩法体系、出装思路，很容易被版本更新直接淘汰，玩法沉淀难度较高。
其次是优化与BUG问题频发。作为一款长线运营游戏，Apex始终未能彻底解决卡顿、掉帧、模型加载异常、技能BUG等问题，新赛季更新往往伴随全新BUG，部分英雄技能、枪械机制偶尔出现异常失效、判定错误等情况，严重影响对局体验。同时游戏配置优化参差不齐，中低配设备难以稳定满帧运行，画面卡顿、延迟波动问题频发。
此外，入门门槛模糊，新手体验两极分化。相较于硬核的CS:GO，Apex上手难度更低，但融合了身法、技能、机动、战术多重机制，想要精通难度极高。新手容易陷入“会开枪、不会拉扯、不会配合技能”的瓶颈，同时路人局炸鱼、车队碾压现象普遍，单排玩家游戏体验不稳定，队友配合断层极易导致对局崩盘。最后，赛季通行证内容同质化严重，付费皮肤溢价较高，性价比偏低，也是玩家长期诟病的问题。
五、整体总结与适配人群
综合来看，《Apex Legends》是一款创新度拉满、娱乐与竞技兼具的顶级大逃杀作品。它打破了传统吃鸡的玩法僵局，以高机动对战、多元英雄战术、流畅的对局节奏、公平的竞技生态，构建了独一无二的战术射击体系。兼顾休闲玩家的娱乐需求与核心玩家的竞技追求，容错率适中、博弈层次丰富，是目前综合体验最均衡的大逃杀网游。
但版本平衡性波动、优化短板、进阶门槛偏高的问题，让它难以做到全年龄段、全玩家群体适配，依然存在明显的体验上限。
适配人群：喜欢快节奏吃鸡、厌倦传统苟分流玩法、偏爱技能战术配合与身法拉扯的射击玩家，适合喜欢团队竞技、追求多元对局乐趣、想要兼顾娱乐与冲分的玩家。
慎入人群：偏爱写实拟真硬核射击、习惯慢节奏运营、讨厌版本频繁变动、追求极致稳定游戏体验的玩家，不建议入坑。
六、最终评分：8.3/10
玩法创新 9.2：重构大逃杀玩法体系，英雄技能+高机动拉扯打破品类桎梏，战术自由度与对局新鲜感拉满
视听表现 8.5：科幻世界观饱满，画面干净适配竞技，音效分层清晰，整体辨识度与沉浸感优异
游戏深度 8.8：枪法、身法、技能、团队战术多维博弈，上手易、精通难，对局上限高，耐玩性极强
新手友好 7.0：入门门槛低，容错率高，但进阶难度大，路人局环境不稳定，新手成长路径较模糊
版本稳定 7.2：内容更新积极，但数值波动大、BUG频发，优化与平衡性问题长期存在
总体而言，《Apex Legends》重新定义了现代大逃杀游戏的形态。它没有陷入传统吃鸡的同质化内卷，而是用机动与战术赋予品类全新生命力。既有轻松娱乐的休闲对局，也有深度博弈的竞技赛场，历经多年迭代依旧热度不减。在吃鸡品类整体疲软的当下，Apex凭借独特的玩法魅力，成为当之无愧的战术竞技标杆，也是所有大逃杀爱好者的首选作品之一。

review: 您好，不管是谁看到这篇信件。我希望您能看完这些字。我游玩这个游戏已经3500个小时，2800小时来自我自己的账号。还有800小时另一个EA账号。我并不知道这个数字对于其他人来说有什么意义。但是对于马上22岁的我来说，这意味着我2%的人生的时间我都花在了名为Apex Legends的游戏中。我在人生活最黑暗的时间遇见了它。在那些因为看不见前途而难以入眠的夜晚，我在它带来的多巴胺褪去时睡去。我开始了解硬件设备，开始了解如何瞄准，开始重新要求自己变得更好。在那些被诟病的赛季里，我依然能感受到乐趣。它帮我交到朋友，帮我驱散作业的劳累，帮我找到每个早上和朋友的谈资。它并不是一款完美的游戏，有很多人说它太难，不友好，太无聊，lagging等等各种问题。但是我爱它。当看到我被BAN的时候，疑惑，害怕，恐惧，失望，愤怒？我不知道我该怎么形容当时的感觉。我并不是在告别一个账号也不是一个游戏。而是我2%的人生。它们甚至不能作为回忆，它们是我这个人真正的一部分。我并不知道这个账号的最终结局会是怎么样子的。我是想告诉看见看见这段文字的人，我热爱这款游戏，或许很难继续下去了，但是2%的我永远留在了这里。

review_english: Hello, whoever reads this letter, I hope you can read these words. I have played this game for 3500 hours, 2800 hours on my own account and 800 hours on another EA account. I don't know what this number means to other people, but for me, who is about to turn 22, it means that I have spent 2 years of my life in a game called Apex Legends. I met it in the darkest time of human life, in those nights when I couldn't sleep because I couldn't see the future. I fell asleep when the dopamine it brought faded. I started to understand the hardware equipment, started to understand how to aim, and started to ask myself to be better again. In those criticized seasons, I can still feel the fun. It helped me make friends, help me get rid of the fatigue of homework, and helped me find things to talk about with my friends every morning. It is not a perfect game. Many people say that it is too difficult, unfriendly, too boring, lagging and other problems, but I love it. When I saw that I was banned, I was confused, scared, fearful, disappointed, angry. I don't know how to describe the feeling at that time. I'm not saying goodbye to an account or a game, but my life. They can't even be used as memories. They are a real part of me. I don't know what the final outcome of this account will be. I want to tell people who see this text that I love this game. It may be difficult to continue, but I will stay here forever.

review:
I honestly don't understand why there are so many negative reviews.

I'm primarily a CS and Dota player, and I've just started playing this game. After about 10 hours, I'm having an absolute blast. Not only am I enjoying it, but I'm also performing well, consistently getting plenty of kills and dealing solid damage.

To anyone considering trying this game: go for it!

Don't let the negative reviews discourage you. Instead of focusing on what others are saying, try it yourself and form your own opinion. A lot of the complaints seem to come from players who get frustrated when they struggle to understand how they died or adapt to the game's mechanics.

Competitive shooters aren't meant to be easy from the start. They require learning, practice, and patience. If you're willing to put in the time, there's a lot of fun to be had here.

I've already picked up the Ultimate+ Battle Pass, and I'm really excited to unlock Ranked mode and start climbing the ladder. Looking forward to seeing how far I can go!

Their customer support is as useless as the devs, I can't wait for this game to die.

review:
Holy crap is this game fun
And holy crap is this game [i]difficult[/i].
If you are trying to play this as a beginner, it's going to take a LOT of time to learn to even stand in the same ring as late-game players. If you're casual, unranked is definitely a game you can have fun in. But if you're the type to GRIND, this game is your ideal playground.

There are tons of legends you can pick from and the abilities they have are so fun to learn and they all have different uses, there are also even classes and specific perks that change how your legends abilities work. Anyways, lets get into the pros and cons.

[b]Pros[/b]
[*]Fast-paced game with a lot of strategy
[*]Several legends to pick from with their own unique abilities
[*]Guns are smooth to use and there's tons of variety
[*]Very good optimizations for my nearly 10 year old untouched PC
[*]HIGH skill ceiling. Lots of movement tech for you to learn and to master. But you don't also need to be incredibly good to play good, it's all in the strategy either way. But for those who'd want to reach predator, everything is available for you to learn, and it is intensily detailed.

[b]Cons[/b]
[*]GRINDSLOP. You need to play so many hours in order to unlock a legend. That can be a turn off. I have 242 hours and I've unlocked 10, 6 of them is included as your starting roster. That means in the 242 hours I've played, I've only unlocked 4, and there is 17 remaining. 
[*]High skill ceiling. Yes I put it here as well, to be honest it's a lot. Sometimes I wanna chill and play the game but I get blasted to oblivion by incredibly good players who can tap strafe and wall jump and then slide mantle jump onto rope cancel rope jump wattson fence slow mozambique kill. Aight I got the memo bro.
[*] Grindslop. Did I say that already?
[*] Time to kill is extremely fast. You can be lasered in one second and die, which is a thing you learn early on. All it takes is one second for you to die if you play out of position or not paying attention. You need to learn positioning and a bit of basic movement tech to be able to survive the first initial burst of damage. It comes with the grind.
[*] Weapons usually have a meta. Most games when you're above plat people start to use Hemlok and something else and there's not big variety. It's just "this weapon is good so use it rest of the game".

It's a free game, I'm not gonna ramble so play it, try it, find the fun guns, the fun legends and learn some basic beginner movements, and you'll understand why it's so addicting. The moment you manage to slide away from shooting opponents, get a shield up and then kill the rushing enemy team is when you'll get hooked on it.

All it takes is one second for you to die if you play out of position or not paying attention. You need to learn positioning and a bit of basic movement tech to be able to survive the first initial burst of damage. It comes with the grind. Weapons usually have a meta. Most games when you're above plat people start to use Hemlok and something else and there's not big variety. It's just "this weapon is good so use it rest of the game". It's a free game, I'm not gonna ramble so play it, try it, find the fun guns, the fun legends and learn some basic beginner movements, and you'll understand why it's so addicting. The moment you manage to slide away from shooting opponents, get a shield up and then kill the rushing enemy team is when you'll get hooked on it.

review:
Не знаю, с чего начать
Для меня это больше чем игра, она связана для меня со школьным временем. Очень хорошо помню, как перед новым годом у меня было очень плохое настроение, но тут мне звонит дружище с которым я играю в апекс, и говорит что там добавили новый новогодний ивент с новым режимом(легендарный поезд на Краю Света).
И это было восхитительно. Я играл в неё в общей сложности наверное лет 5, с момента середины первого сезона. Наиграл, наверное, пару тысяч часов. Это всё было на ПС4, потому тут у меня 8 часов. 
И вот я попробовал в неё вернуться вновь после того как я отслужил в армии, а бро улетел в Китай, из за чего вместе поиграть нам теперь очень сложно. Недавно я в неё играл с лучшим другом, мы вспоминали былое время, которое казалось как оно часто бывает - раньше трава была зеленее и прочее. 
Субъективно, сейчас игра кажется немного перегруженной - у каждого персонажа свой класс, свои особенности, свои собственные мини-перки которые ты получаешь по мере катки. Это прикольно и добавляет глубины, но мне, человеку наигравшему тысячи часов в сие творение, было тяжело разобраться в новых особенностях.
Но несмотря на старания текущей команды респавн или кто там сейчас у руля, онлайн в игре кажется падает. В ру сегменте уж точно. В дуо режиме половина карты уже ограничена, а вместо обычных (вроде) 45 игроков сейчас 30. И это очень грустно
Вкатываться в Арех сейчас - сложно, однако как баттл рояль игра всё еще очень даже хороша. Новичкам - рекомендую. Старичкам - решайте сами. Готовы ли увидеть, что стало с игрой, некогда занимающей особое место в вашем сердце?

review_english: I don't know where to start. For me this is more than a game, for me it is connected with my school time. I remember very well how before the New Year I was in a very bad mood, but then a friend with whom I play Apex called me and said that they had added a new New Year’s event with a new mode (the legendary train at the End of the World). And it was amazing. I played it for a total of probably 5 years, since the middle of the first season. I've probably played a couple of thousand hours. This was all on PS4, so I have 8 hours here. And so I tried to return to it again after I served in the army, and my bro flew to China, which makes it very difficult for us to play together now. I recently played it with my best friend, we were remembering the old time, which seemed like it often happens - before the grass was greener and so on. Subjectively, now the game seems a little overloaded - each character has its own class, its own characteristics, its own mini-perks that you get as you progress. This is cool and adds depth, but for me, a person who has played thousands of hours in this creation, it was difficult to understand the new features. But despite the efforts of the current respawn team or whoever is at the helm now, online play in the game seems to be falling. In the Russian segment for sure. In duo mode, half of the map is already limited, and instead of the usual (sort of) 45 players there are now 30. And this is very sad. Getting into Arekh now is difficult, but as a battle royale the game is still very good. I recommend it for beginners. Old people - decide for yourself. Are you ready to see what has become of the game that once held a special place in your heart?

review:
Рекомендую для всех, кто хочет смотреть на экран загрузки дольше, чем на сами катки, 10 загрузочных экранов из 10 :)
А если серьёзно, то это один из лучших BR, в которые я играл. Зацепило в своё время самобытным геймплеем и комьюнити, стрельба одна из приятнейших, мувмент что-то с чем-то.. И очень жаль, что сейчас также про эту игру не скажешь..
1) Проблемы с серверами - обходы каждый раз ломаются, устаёшь менять впны, прокси и все типы обходов, чтобы поиграть
2) Читеры - в каждой катке можно встретить чела с софтом или DMA-устройством (Это те, которые на мышке делают аим-ассист как на геймпаде), из-за чего каждая катка превращается в лотерею: А попадёшься ли ты читеру или нет?)))
3) Баланс - с одной стороны пытаются урезать мувмент, с другой добавляют персов, завязанных на мувменте - ... нет слов

Минусов много, но я не могу винить игру за все воспоминания, которые я получил за это долгое время. И надеюсь, что когда-нибудь игра вернёт свой прайм (Ну и чтоб к этому времени гады на ркн перестали блочить всё подряд), чтобы полноценно вернуться и каждый 2 второй оказываться в самом смачном бутерброде из возможных :D
P.S. Потом ещё отзыв дополню и отредачу

review_english: I recommend for anyone who wants to look at the loading screen longer than the rinks themselves, 10 loading screens out of 10) But seriously, this is one of the best BRs I've played. I was hooked at the time by the original gameplay and the community, the shooting is one of the most enjoyable, the movement is something with something.. And it’s a shame that now you can’t say the same about this game.. 1) Problems with servers - bypasses break every time, you get tired of changing VPNs, proxies and all types of bypasses in order to play 2) Cheaters - in every skating rink you can meet people with software or DMA device (These are the ones that do aim assist on a mouse like on a gamepad), because of which each roll turns into a lottery. Will you get caught by a cheater or not?))) 3) Balance - on the one hand they are trying to cut down the movement, on the other they add characters tied to the movement - ... no words There are a lot of minuses, but I can’t blame the game for all the memories that I got over this long time. And I hope that someday the game will return to its prime (Well, so that by this time the bastards on RKN will stop blocking everything) in order to fully return and every 2 second one will end up in the most delicious sandwich possible D P.S. Then I’ll add another review and edit it

review:
⊹ ࣪ ˖ **Recommended** ˖ ࣪ ⊹

**Apex Legends™** is a game I do not really play anymore, but I did enjoy it a lot when I was playing. It gave me some fun memories, even if it is not something I come back to much now. ⋆˚꩜｡

The gameplay is fast, chaotic, and very team-focused. You pick from different Legends, each with their own abilities, drop into matches, loot weapons and gear, fight other squads, and try to be the last team standing. ✧

I liked how each character brought something different to the game. The abilities made fights feel more interesting, and the movement made everything feel quick and intense. When a match was going well, it felt really satisfying. ˚₊‧꒰ა ☆ ໒꒱ ‧₊˚

It can definitely be stressful, especially if you are not playing with the right team or if the matchmaking feels rough, but when it is fun, it is really fun. ⟡

Overall, **Apex Legends™** is a solid battle royale with fun characters, fast gameplay, and a lot of chaotic moments. I may not play it anymore, but I enjoyed the time I spent with it. ✨

review:
Apex Legends is a philisophical question posed as a first person battle royale. On its surface, it appears as a free to play game made by a game studio riding the coatails of a revolutionary and fantastic game series. After its veneer of "product of its time" is peeled away, all that stands is a tough question. 

How much disrespect are you willing to endure? This is the question at the heart of this game. 

Apex Legends pillages and tears at the carcass of Titanfall, drip-feeding its lifeblood to its players. Long time fans of Titanfall will reminice on the familiar guns and memorabilia of the two predeceossors of Apex Legends. It gives you enough of a sense of care for the franchise that had built the foundation Apex sits on, however never enough to satisfy. Like a carrot leading each and every player to the never ending day that something new (or God foreake something better) will come out of the hellish bowels of EA and Respawn entertainment. 

How much disrespect are you willing to endure?

Are you willing to endure a matchmaking system so bipolar that average players will be matched with the top 500 most skilled or often times, carried players? Contsantly being placed in (un-ranked) sweatfests where the most fun you can attain is by how ridiculous you can contort your character model to dodge the enslaught of bullets heading directly to you. 

Are you willing to endure servers so poor that bullets will ignore the existence of its brethren code that is collision to any object that isint your character? This, keep in mind, is compounded with its host servers notorious for instability and sluggishness.

Are you willing to endure characters so unlikable and downright unbalanced that their mere existence is a blight to be witnessed anytime their assembly of pixels is projected unto your eyes?

Are you willing to endure the predatory microtransaction scheme that constantly re-invents ways to flush your money into the pockets of billionare company EA?

And are you willing to endure the most widely abused system that plauges crossplay in the shooter genre? At higher-than-average level of play, in my limited dataset, 90% of PC players choose to forgoe their more accurate pheriperal in-place of an artificially enhanced "ez trak" system. This enforces an awful mindset of join or be out-gunned at close ranges. When losing to players that choose to play on controller to gain a buff to their tracking feels less like being outskilled and more like slighted by a game that dosent respect a player content with making miniscule mistakes. 

How much disrespect are you willing to endure?

If you are a proponent of teaching yourself to reinforce your mental fortitude and composure when being treated as nothing but a useful wallet. Then the answer is the the above questions is I will endure. 

As for my friends and I, I will say that we will endure this product as the suffering it throws is puny in comparison to what Escape From Tarkov has already thrown our way.

TLDR;

7/10 game, is alright, kinda sweaty.

review:
I started this game back in 2012 and immediately fell in love. I have over 1,300 hours on Xbox dedicated to learning the game. Apex is a fast paced and insanely difficult battle royale with tons of versatility; firing range with the boys, grinding ranked, or cooking in wildcard are all very fun options! The movement and gun feel are like no other game out there. I have found that other FPS games feel extremely slow comparatively. I love racing around the map and chasing down enemies with my trusty grapple!

9/10 would recommend. 

Apex has seen some great balancing changes recently and is quickly becoming better than ever. If there is ever a time to download the game it's right now!

review: bu kadar akışkan bir oyunda nasıl oluyor da bu derece bozuk mekanikler bulunabilmesine izin veriliyor anlamıyorum. Ses sistemi iğrenç , adamlar kafanıza atlıyor ultilerini kullanıyorlar sesler uzaktan geliyor veya bazen neredeyse gelmiyor. mermi yedikten sonra anlıyorsunuz adamın yanınıza geldiğini :D kaç defa arkadaşla birbirimize baktığımızı bilmiyorum çünkü sesler anlaşılmıyor. Zaten movement olayı acayip içine edilmiş durumda. skirmisher veya uçan zıplayan bir karakter oynamıyorsanız geçmiş olsun , kuduz köpek .... sizi gördüğü gibi sadece peşliyorlar :D Hani biraz taktiksellik falan arıyorsanız karakterlerin özelliklerine bağlı veya map dizaynına falan kesinlikle beklemeeyin :D skirmisher karakter al ve üstüne koşup kayarak hipfire silahlarıyla sık veyahut zaten 100m kaydığınız için adamın edpı 10k falan değilse size mermilerini tutturamayacak :D HE GEL GELELİM OYUNDAKİ MERMİ PATERNİ VE KOL DESTEĞİNE. YA ARKADAŞLAR KOL OYUNCULARI ENGELLİ BİREYLERDE BİZ ONLARI MUTLU ETMEYE Mİ ÇALIŞIYORUZ ? NİYE TÜM MERMİLERİ TUTTURACAK SEVİYEDE BİR KOL DESTEĞİ SUNUYORUZ BU ADAMLARA ? silah fark etmeksizin %80den az mermi isabet oranı yok bu adamların. (skirmisher oynuyorsanız ve 100m kayıyorsanız belki düşebilir bu isabet oranı ) veyahut 1-2 mermi tutturduktan sonra geri kalan mermilerin anlamsız tutma oranı ne böyle ya ? adamı gördüğüm gibi dürbün açıyorum ve yere düşüyorum , ben ne zaman adamlarla göğüs göğüse çarpışacağım olum şaka mısınız ? 1.5-2 sn yere mi serilir adam ? ee tabiiki kolla oynayıp aim desteği kullanıyotsanız bu mümkün :D mousela mı oynuyorsunuz oyunun çokta .... .... Oyuncu kitlesi zaten akılsız insan sürüsü zırh,can,mermi.özellik kullanımı nafile . adam görüldü mü görüldü sadece kovalamaya başlıyorlar ve skirmisher karakterlerin hitboxları aşırı büyük(!) olduğu için ve bizde kolla oynadığımız(!) için çok zevkli savaşlar yaşıyoruz :). Hareket mekaniklerinden ses mkenaiklerine , karakter dizaynlarından (özellik ,hitbox vs) oyun içindeki silah ve mermi isabet oranına kadar her şeyinde sorun var. Çok iyi ve zevkli akışkan ve smooth bir battle royale oyunu olabilme potansiyeli her geçen gün düşüyor. Peki bu kadar oynayan nasıl mı oynuyor ? oyunu oynadıktan sonra göreceksiniz ki düpedüz hiçbir taktik olmadan oynayan , hep birbirine benzeyen ve aynı karakterleri oynayan (bozuk skirmisher ve 2-3 uçan kaçan karakter) , KOL DESTEĞİ KULLANAN KOL OYUNCULARI oynuyor sadece. kendinize bir iyilik yapın ve bu saçma oyuna herhangi bir zaman harcamayın ( bu arada 60k saatle hür irademle sadece 2 karakter açabildim xd karakter açmak bile bir dert  oyunda . aynen çeşitlilik aynen oynanış aynen zevkli çatışmalar ) ( Bu kadar sorun ve dengesizlik varken yeni skirmisher karakteri AXLE oynamak ister misiniz :) )
